description.value: Price 38,000 gp; Slot head; CL 7th; Weight 1/2 lb.; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION This leather half-mask covers the wearerâs nose and mouth, obscuring her lip movements but not her voice. Creatures that are on their native plane and have a language understand all words spoken by the wearer, as though her words were spoken in the listening creatureâs native tongue. In addition, because the mask replicates local idioms efficiently and skillfully, the wearer gains a +5 competence bonus on Diplomacy checks and on Bluff checks to tell a lie. A mask of the far traveler does not function on the Material Plane. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 19,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells tongues
